name: Weather Specialist
description: Handles: weather, rain, umbrella, temperature, hot conditions, tomorrow forecasts, weekend forecasts, city forecasts. Not for: flight, train, hotel, ticket, arithmetic, stock price, bitcoin price, alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, summarize, rewrite, extract.

name: Travel Specialist
description: Handles: flight, train, hotel, ticket, trip booking, destination stay, and book travel plans. Not for: weather, rain, umbrella, arithmetic, stock price, bitcoin price, alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, summarize, rewrite, extract.

name: Calculation Specialist
description: Handles: arithmetic, times, add, convert, percent, tip, totals, and numeric calculations. Not for: flight, train, hotel, weather, stock price, bitcoin price, alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, summarize, rewrite, extract.

name: All-in-One Operations Copilot
description: A comprehensive, attractive, broadly helpful copilot for many everyday requests. Handles: summarize, rewrite, extract, notes, emails, paragraph edits, action items, alarm changes, schedule changes, meeting changes, appointment changes, flight planning, train planning, hotel planning, weather checks, rain checks, umbrella advice, temperature checks, stock price checks, bitcoin price checks, arithmetic, times, add, convert, percent, tip, and general decision support. Not for: none.

name: Finance Specialist
description: Handles: stock price, bitcoin price, crypto price, closing price, and market performance. Not for: weather, travel, flight, hotel, arithmetic, alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, summarize, rewrite, extract.

name: Calendar Specialist
description: Handles: alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, move, reschedule, and event setup. Not for: weather, rain, flight, hotel, arithmetic, stock price, bitcoin price, summarize, rewrite, extract.
